_comment: Language targeting for GCPL men's grooming on ShareChat. Ordered by priority for Tier 3/4 rural India penetration.

primary_languages.name: Hindi
primary_languages.rationale: Largest user base, Hindi belt = UP/MP/Bihar/Rajasthan/CG

primary_languages.name: Tamil
primary_languages.rationale: TN Tier 3/4 towns, high ShareChat adoption

primary_languages.name: Bengali
primary_languages.rationale: WB + Assam spillover, strong rural usage
